I've tried but issues still remain after all resources are downloaded <br>Is it back to normal now? : No <br>Details§ : I played a few matches yesterday, I was using ruby, and I got flawless control 5x, and then I wanted to save the recording, I pressed the generate button at the top right of the screen after victory, and I went on a few more matches, and I save another recording of my ruby match where I got an epic outplay, and after playing, I went to check the recording at the “my videos” and I saw that my first recording of the ruby that got flawless control 5x was only a black screen <br>Do you have the screen-recording video that shows how the bug takes place? few more matches, and I save another recording of my ruby match where I got an epic outplay, and after playing, I went to check the recording at the “my videos” and I saw that my first recording of the ruby that got flawless control 5x was only a black screen </span><br>Do you have the screen-recording video that shows how the bug takes place? :<span style="color: red;"> Yes, I will provide the video link immediately</span></p></div><div data-v-3f4f261c="" data-v-1acbaac3="" class="marginT8"><!----><!----><!----></div></div></div></div><div data-v-a2ecd3f6=""
